mapper.select: select id, user_id as userId, friend_id as friendId, status, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime from friend_relation where ((user_id = #{userId} and friend_id = #{friendId}) or (user_id = #{friendId} and friend_id = #{userId})) limit 1
select id, user_id as userId, friend_id as friendId, status, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime from friend_relation where id = #{id} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into friend_relation(user_id, friend_id, status, create_time, update_time) values(#{userId}, #{friendId}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: select u.id as userId, u.name as name, u.username as username, u.email as email, u.avatar as avatar, ( select pm.content from private_message pm where (pm.sender_id = #{userId} and pm.receiver_id = u.id) or (pm.sender_id = u.id and pm.receiver_id = #{userId}) order by pm.create_time desc, pm.id desc limit 1 ) as lastMessage, ( select date_format(pm.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') from private_message pm where (pm.sender_id = #{userId} and pm.receiver_id = u.id) or (pm.sender_id = u.id and pm.receiver_id = #{userId}) order by pm.create_time desc, pm.id desc limit 1 ) as lastMessageTime, ( select count(1) from private_message pm where pm.sender_id = u.id and pm.receiver_id = #{userId} and pm.is_read = 0 ) as unreadCount, ( select pm.is_read from private_message pm where (pm.sender_id = #{userId} and pm.receiver_id = u.id) or (pm.sender_id = u.id and pm.receiver_id = #{userId}) order by pm.create_time desc, pm.id desc limit 1 ) as lastMessageIsRead from friend_relation fr join user u on ( (fr.user_id = #{userId} and u.id = fr.friend_id) or (fr.friend_id = #{userId} and u.id = fr.user_id) ) where fr.status = 1 order by fr.update_time desc

select fr.id as id, fr.user_id as requesterId, u.name as requesterName, u.username as requesterUsername, u.email as requesterEmail, u.avatar as requesterAvatar, fr.status as status, fr.create_time as createTime from friend_relation fr join user u on u.id = fr.user_id where fr.friend_id = #{userId} and fr.status = 0 order by fr.create_time desc
